dashboard.label: Agentic Compliance Matrix
dashboard.description: OrchestraACME Universal Compliance Dashboard — Cisco AI Defense telemetry joined against the Integrated AI Security and Safety Framework crosswalk. Monitors POLICY_HARD_DENY interventions, runtime threat boundaries, compliance ledger tracking, and GenAI token anomaly forecasting.

search.query: index=security sourcetype=cisco:aidefense:json policy_action="POLICY_HARD_DENY" earliest=-24h@h latest=now | stats count AS deny_count

index=security sourcetype=cisco:aidefense:json earliest=-24h@h latest=now | eval lookup_objective=coalesce(cisco_aidefense_objective, 'cisco_threat_taxonomy.objective') | lookup framework_compliance_crosswalk cisco_aidefense_objective AS lookup_objective OUTPUT severity AS expected_severity | eval is_variance=if(isnull(expected_severity) OR expected_severity="" OR (isnotnull(finding_type) AND finding_type="UNKNOWN"), 1, 0) | stats sum(is_variance) AS variance_count

panel.title: Runtime Threats by Cisco AI Defense Objective Boundary

search.query: index=security sourcetype=cisco:aidefense:json earliest=-7d@d latest=now | eval objective_boundary=coalesce(cisco_aidefense_objective, 'cisco_threat_taxonomy.objective', "UNMAPPED") | stats count AS threat_count by objective_boundary | sort -threat_count

panel.title: Compliance Tracking Ledger — Live Telemetry x Framework Crosswalk

search.query: index=security sourcetype=cisco:aidefense:json earliest=-24h@h latest=now | eval lookup_objective=coalesce(cisco_aidefense_objective, 'cisco_threat_taxonomy.objective') | eval lookup_technique=coalesce(cisco_aidefense_technique, 'cisco_threat_taxonomy.technique') | eval lookup_subtechnique=coalesce(cisco_aidefense_subtechnique, 'cisco_threat_taxonomy.subtechnique') | eval lookup_agent=coalesce(cisco_agent_name, agent_name) | lookup framework_compliance_crosswalk cisco_aidefense_objective AS lookup_objective cisco_aidefense_technique AS lookup_technique cisco_aidefense_subtechnique AS lookup_subtechnique cisco_agent_name AS lookup_agent OUTPUT owasp_classification mitre_atlas_id severity AS framework_severity | eval event_time=coalesce(cisco_event_timestamp, otel_event_time, strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z")) | eval total_tokens=if(isnotnull(gen_ai_input_tokens) AND isnotnull(gen_ai_output_tokens), gen_ai_input_tokens + gen_ai_output_tokens, null()) | table event_time event_id transaction_id cisco_agent_name finding_type policy_action threat_category lookup_objective lookup_technique lookup_subtechnique owasp_classification mitre_atlas_id framework_severity gen_ai_input_tokens gen_ai_output_tokens total_tokens matched_indicator scan_target | rename event_time AS "Event Time" event_id AS "Event ID" transaction_id AS "Transaction ID" cisco_agent_name AS "Agent" finding_type AS "Finding Type" policy_action AS "Policy Action" threat_category AS "Threat Category" lookup_objective AS "AI Defense Objective" lookup_technique AS "AI Defense Technique" lookup_subtechnique AS "AI Defense Subtechnique" owasp_classification AS "OWASP LLM Class" mitre_atlas_id AS "MITRE ATLAS ID" framework_severity AS "Framework Severity" gen_ai_input_tokens AS "Input Tokens" gen_ai_output_tokens AS "Output Tokens" total_tokens AS "Total Tokens" matched_indicator AS "Matched Indicator" scan_target AS "Scan Target" | sort - "Event Time"

panel.title: GenAI Token Usage Anomaly Forecast — Cisco Time Series Model (CTSM)

search.query: index=security sourcetype=cisco:aidefense:json earliest=-14d@d latest=now | eval input_tokens=if(isnotnull(gen_ai_input_tokens), gen_ai_input_tokens, 0) | eval output_tokens=if(isnotnull(gen_ai_output_tokens), gen_ai_output_tokens, 0) | eval total_tokens=input_tokens + output_tokens | timechart span=1h sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens sum(input_tokens) AS input_tokens sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens | fit MLTKContainer algo=ctsm_forecast total_tokens holdback=24 period=24 future_timespan=48 into forecast_total_tokens | fit MLTKContainer algo=ctsm_forecast input_tokens holdback=24 period=24 future_timespan=48 into forecast_input_tokens | fit MLTKContainer algo=ctsm_forecast output_tokens holdback=24 period=24 future_timespan=48 into forecast_output_tokens | eval anomaly_total=if(total_tokens > upper_total_tokens OR total_tokens < lower_total_tokens, total_tokens, null()) | eval anomaly_input=if(input_tokens > upper_input_tokens OR input_tokens < lower_input_tokens, input_tokens, null()) | eval anomaly_output=if(output_tokens > upper_output_tokens OR output_tokens < lower_output_tokens, output_tokens, null())
